title: APM: DOM-Based Attack via Dangerous JavaScript APIs
description: Detects DOM-based attacks using dangerous JavaScript APIs in browser telemetry spans. Monitors for document.cookie access, eval() calls, innerHTML manipulation captured by OpenTelemetry browser instrumentation.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%document.cookie%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%document.write%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%eval(%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%.innerHTML%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%location.hash%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%String.fromCharCode%') | stats count as Attacks by 'HTTP URL', 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'service.name' | sort -Attacks
falsepositives: Legitimate SPA frameworks using innerHTML for rendering
